    s.push(10)

    s.push(30)
    print(s.size())
    print(s.pop())
    print(s.size())
    print(Int(s.empty()))

name: IntQueue
mojo_unit:
struct IntQueue(Copyable, Movable):
    var data: List[Int]
    var head: Int

    def __init__(out self):
        self.data = List[Int]()
        self.head = 0

    def enqueue(mut self, x: Int):
        self.data.append(x)

    def dequeue(mut self) -> Int:
        var v = self.data[self.head]
        self.head = self.head + 1
        return v

    def count(self) -> Int:
        return len(self.data) - self.head
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var q = IntQueue()
    q.enqueue(1)
    q.enqueue(2)
    q.enqueue(3)
    print(q.dequeue())
    print(q.count())
    print(q.dequeue())
    print(q.count())

Circle
mojo_unit:
@fieldwise_init
struct Circle(Copyable, Movable):
    var cx: Float64
    var cy: Float64
    var radius: Float64

def circle_area(c: Circle) -> Float64:
    return 3.141592653589793 * c.radius * c.radius

def point_inside(c: Circle, px: Float64, py: Float64) -> Bool:
    var dx = px - c.cx
    var dy = py - c.cy
    return dx*dx + dy*dy <= c.radius*c.radius
